why: Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound minecraft:custom_payload must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a custom_payload body decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for one official BrandPayload fixture only and is separate from arbitrary plugin-channel handling, payload routing policy, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_custom_payload_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Serverbound, packet id 2, official body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration serverbound packet id 0x02.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: BrandPayload(String), BrandPayload.STREAM_CODEC, ServerboundCustomPayloadPacket(CustomPacketPayload), ServerboundCustomPayloadPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.SERVERBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ServerboundCustomPayloadPacket), ConfigurationProtocols.SERVERBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), ServerboundCustomPayloadPacket.payload(), BrandPayload.type(), and BrandPayload.brand().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration serverbound custom_payload dispatch.

Current Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound mapping contains client_information id 0x00, cookie_response id 0x01, finish_configuration id 0x03, keep_alive id 0x04, pong id 0x05, resource_pack id 0x06, select_known_packs id 0x07, custom_click_action id 0x08, and accept_code_of_conduct id 0x09, but not custom_payload id 0x02.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0x2 in Serverbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration serverbound custom_payload packet id 2
